{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Pharmacist",
  "description": "ExCare is a leading primary healthcare provider committed to connecting stakeholders and providing easy access to primary healthcare. What started as a retail pharmacy has evolved into a multi-faceted healthcare hub, integrating pharmacy, diagnostics, and immunization services to deliver a seamless experience for our customers.

With 5 retail pharmacies, 2 laboratories, and an NPHCDA-approved immunization center, we are redefining community healthcare through innovation, convenience, and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Pharmacist

Job Locations: Ifo - Ogun and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	ExCare Health is seeking a motivated and innovative Pharmacist to drive sales growth, deliver high-quality pharmaceutical care, and support the overall profitability of our retail pharmacy operations.
	The role combines clinical excellence with commercial awareness and operational leadership.


Key Responsibilities


	Review prescriptions accurately and provide patient counselling to ensure safe and effective medication use.
	Organise and manage the pharmacy layout for efficient identification of drugs and sundries.
	Oversee inventory movement to prevent product deterioration, shortages, and expiry.
	Drive the marketing and delivery of pharmacy services, including rapid health checks.
	Contribute to sales growth, category performance, and branch profitability through innovation and customer-focused initiatives.
	Stay current with trends and advancements in the health sector through continuous learning and professional collaboration.
	Ensure full compliance with regulatory, legal, and professional practice standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Pharmacy.
	Valid license to practice as a Pharmacist.
	Working knowledge of MS Office and pharmacy information systems.
	Strong communication skills, professional integrity, and a patient-centred approach.


Salary and Benefits


	N300,000 - N400,000 / month.
	Provision of Accommodation


Method of Application
Interested cand qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@excareng.com using the Job Position and their preferred Location as the subject of the mail. Eg.&nbsp;&nbsp;(Pharmacist - Lagos).",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-03",

  },

Pharmacist Job at ExCare Health




        
    

        
        ExCare is a leading primary healthcare provider committed to connecting stakeholders and providing easy access to primary healthcare. What started as a retail pharmacy has evolved into a multi-faceted healthcare hub, integrating pharmacy, diagnostics, and immunization services to deliver a seamless experience for our customers.

With 5 retail pharmacies, 2 laboratories, and an NPHCDA-approved immunization center, we are redefining community healthcare through innovation, convenience, and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Pharmacist

Job Locations: Ifo - Ogun and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	ExCare Health is seeking a motivated and innovative Pharmacist to drive sales growth, deliver high-quality pharmaceutical care, and support the overall profitability of our retail pharmacy operations.
	The role combines clinical excellence with commercial awareness and operational leadership.


Key Responsibilities


	Review prescriptions accurately and provide patient counselling to ensure safe and effective medication use.
	Organise and manage the pharmacy layout for efficient identification of drugs and sundries.
	Oversee inventory movement to prevent product deterioration, shortages, and expiry.
	Drive the marketing and delivery of pharmacy services, including rapid health checks.
	Contribute to sales growth, category performance, and branch profitability through innovation and customer-focused initiatives.
	Stay current with trends and advancements in the health sector through continuous learning and professional collaboration.
	Ensure full compliance with regulatory, legal, and professional practice standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy.
	Valid license to practice as a Pharmacist.
	Working knowledge of MS Office and pharmacy information systems.
	Strong communication skills, professional integrity, and a patient-centred approach.


Salary and Benefits


	N300,000 - N400,000 / month.
	Provision of Accommodation


Method of Application
Interested cand qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and their preferred Location as the subject of the mail. Eg.  (Pharmacist - Lagos).    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Westfield Consulting Limited - Our client in the Confectionery business is recruiting qualified and passionate candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mide: Fully onsite

Job Summary


	The Front Desk Officer is responsible for managing the reception area, providing excellent customer service, and performing administrative task to ensure smooth operations.


Principal Duties and Responsibilities


	Welcomes customers and provides basic information about products and services.
	Handles phone calls, messages, and walk-in inquiries.
	Manages order bookings, pick-ups, and customer complaints.
	Maintains a clean, organized reception area and supports daily shop operations.
	Handles WhatsApp orders and online orders
	Contributes to team effort when required
	Takes messages and communicates them to appropriate enquirers.


Qualifications and Experience


	BSc / HND / ND / NCE in any field.
	1 - 2 years of experience in Customer Service.
	Good communication skill.
	Proficiency in Microsoft suite.


Salary
N80,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their current CV to: victor.allu@westfield-consulting.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Front Desk Officer Job at Westfield Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Westfield Consulting Limited - Our client in the Confectionery business is recruiting qualified and passionate candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mide: Fully onsite

Job Summary


	The Front Desk Officer is responsible for managing the reception area, providing excellent customer service, and performing administrative task to ensure smooth operations.


Principal Duties and Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Welcomes customers and provides basic information about products and services.
	Handles phone calls, messages, and walk-in inquiries.
	Manages order bookings, pick-ups, and customer complaints.
	Maintains a clean, organized reception area and supports daily shop operations.
	Handles WhatsApp orders and online orders
	Contributes to team effort when required
	Takes messages and communicates them to appropriate enquirers.


Qualifications and Experience


	BSc / HND / ND / NCE in any field.
	1 - 2 years of experience in Customer Service.
	Good communication skill.
	Proficiency in Microsoft suite.


Salary
N80,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their current CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Help Desk Manager",
  "description": "Zinance Limited is a dynamic Information Technology and Consulting firm committed to delivering innovative digital solutions and strategic advisory services to businesses of all sizes.
We combine technical expertise with industry insight to help organizations improve performance, streamline operations, and achieve sustainable growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Help Desk Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are currently seeking a highly qualified Help Desk Manager to join our team. In this role, you will have the crucial responsibility of leading our technical support team and ensuring the delivery of exceptional customer service while effectively resolving all technical issues.


Responsibilities


	Manage the help desk team and evaluate performance
	Ensure customer service is timely and accurate on a daily basis
	Recruit, train and support help desk representatives and technicians
	Set specific customer service standards
	Contribute to improving customer support by actively responding to queries and handling complaints
	Establish best practices through the entire technical support process
	Follow up with customers to identify areas of improvement
	Develop daily, weekly and monthly reports on help desk team&rsquo;s productivity
	Provide customer feedback to the appropriate internal teams, like product developers


Requirements and skills


	Hands on experience with help desk and remote control software
	Solid technical background with an ability to give instructions to a non-technical audience
	Customer-service oriented with a problem-solving attitude
	Excellent written and verbal communications skills
	Team management skills


Salary
N100,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified applicants should forward their CV to: zinancelimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Help Desk Manager Job at Zinance Limited




        
    

        
        Zinance Limited is a dynamic Information Technology and Consulting firm committed to delivering innovative digital solutions and strategic advisory services to businesses of all sizes.
We combine technical expertise with industry insight to help organizations improve performance, streamline operations, and achieve sustainable growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Help Desk Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are currently seeking a highly qualified Help Desk Manager to join our team. In this role, you will have the crucial responsibility of leading our technical support team and ensuring the delivery of exceptional customer service while effectively resolving all technical issues.


Responsibilities


	Manage the help desk team and evaluate performance
	Ensure customer service is timely and accurate on a daily basis
	Recruit, train and support help desk representatives and technicians
	Set specific customer service standards
	Contribute to improving customer support by actively responding to queries and handling complaints
	Establish best practices through the entire technical support process
	Follow up with customers to identify areas of improvement
	Develop daily, weekly and monthly reports on help desk team’s productivity
	Provide customer feedback to the appropriate internal teams, like product developers


Requirements and skills


	Hands on experience with help desk and remote control software
	Solid technical background with an ability to give instructions to a non-technical audience
	Customer-service oriented with a problem-solving attitude
	Excellent written and verbal communications skills
	Team management skills


Salary
N100,000 - N180,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified applicants should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Westfield Consulting was founded in January 2012, by a team of Nigerians with over 45 years of cumulative work experience in management and consultancy. Westfield Consulting is a provider of Human Resource and Strategic Management Services. Our focus on innovation and excellence in service delivery has made us a first choice to our growing clientele in various sectors. We have successfully achieved a positive work force attitude, while engineering a more motivated and committed workforce for our clients with notable results Our results provide a testament about the quality of our services. 70% of our business is repeat business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Supervisor

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work mode: Fully Onsite

Job Summary


	The Admin Supervisor is responsible for managing office operations, supporting staff, and ensuring efficient administrative processes within the company.


Principal Duties and Responsibilities


	Oversee day-to-day administrative operations of the bakery.
	Coordinates staff schedules, maintains records, and ensures smooth workflow.
	Supervises procurement of ingredients, materials, and supplies.
	Ensures compliance with company policies and supports management in decision-making.
	Keeps inventory, creates job orders
	Follow up with customer complaints


Qualification and Experience


	BSc/HND/ND/NCE in any field with 2 - 3 years of experience in any discipline.
	Strong communication and negotiation skill
	Good Leadership skill.


Salary
N150,000 / Month (Gross)

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their current CV to: victor.allu@westfield-consulting.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Admin Supervisor Job at Westfield Consulting




        
    

        
        Westfield Consulting was founded in January 2012, by a team of Nigerians with over 45 years of cumulative work experience in management and consultancy. Westfield Consulting is a provider of Human Resource and Strategic Management Services. Our focus on innovation and excellence in service delivery has made us a first choice to our growing clientele in various sectors. We have successfully achieved a positive work force attitude, while engineering a more motivated and committed workforce for our clients with notable results Our results provide a testament about the quality of our services. 70% of our business is repeat business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Supervisor
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work mode: Fully Onsite

Job Summary


	The Admin Supervisor is responsible for managing office operations, supporting staff, and ensuring efficient administrative processes within the company.


Principal Duties and Responsibilities


	Oversee day-to-day administrative operations of the bakery.
	Coordinates staff schedules, maintains records, and ensures smooth workflow.
	Supervises procurement of ingredients, materials, and supplies.
	Ensures compliance with company policies and supports management in decision-making.
	Keeps inventory, creates job orders
	Follow up with customer complaints


Qualification and Experience


	BSc/HND/ND/NCE in any field with 2 - 3 years of experience in any discipline.
	Strong communication and negotiation skill
	Good Leadership skill.


Salary
N150,000 / Month (Gross)

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their current CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Growth Manager",
  "description": "Zojatech Technology Limited is a digital transformation consultancy and software development company based in Nigeria. They specialize in providing innovative software solutions aimed at streamlining work processes, enhancing productivity, and enabling business scalability. Their services include software development, web design, mobile app development, digital marketing, and IT consulting, making them a key player in delivering effective technology solutions across various industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Growth Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: VP Growth
Direct Reports: Solutions Architect, Senior Solutions Architect, Product Managers, Engineering, Interns
Internal Relationships: Project Unit, Heads of Divisions, Engineering, Sales
External Relationships: Client Execs, Vendors

&nbsp;

Job Summary


	The Senior Growth Manager will be responsible for driving user acquisition, engagement, and revenue growth for our B2B and B2C product.
	This person will lead the development and execution of growth strategies across the entire customer journey, from acquisition to retention and loyalty. As a key member of the leadership team, the Senior Growth Manager will work closely with product, engineering and strategy to build, measure, and optimize growth efforts.


Key Roles &amp; Responsibilities


	Develop and execute a comprehensive growth strategy to drive user acquisition, engagement, and revenue.
	Collaborate with product, strategy, and engineering teams to identify, prioritize, and execute on growth opportunities.
	Analyze user data and customer feedback to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities for growth.
	Develop and maintain a deep understanding of our target customer segments and the competitive landscape.
	Design and run experiments to test different growth tactics and optimize performance.
	Design, measure, and optimize the customer journey across all channels and stages, from acquisition to retention and loyalty.
	Create and manage a growth dashboard to track key metrics and communicate progress to the leadership team.
	Lead the marketing team to develop and execute marketing campaigns that drive growth.
	Collaborate with engineering and product teams to develop new features and product enhancements that drive growth.
	Stay up-to-date with the latest growth tactics and best practices in the industry.
	Lead and develop a strong growth team.
	Develop and execute strategies to scale the company&rsquo;s product by gaining adequate market shareand industry leadership.


Academic Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field.
	Core strength and verifiable experience in scaling startups
	Strong analytical skills and experience using data to drive decision-making.
	Strong project management and team management skills.
	Experience with A/B testing and experimentation.
	Strong understanding of customer acquisition and retention strategies.
	Experience in the Fintech industry is a plus.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.


Professional Qualifications:


	MBA, CCIE, CCNP, CCNA, MCSE, or any other relevant professional qualifications.


Experience:


	Minimum of 5 years of experience in growth or marketing roles, with at least 2 years of experience in a leadership role.
	5 years in an ICT Operating environment with hands on experience in Network Administration, Network Security, LAN/WAN optimization, Project delivery, Technical solutions designing, and executive management and at least 3 years in senior management positions, Knowledge of programming language.


Skills &amp; Competencies:
The competence proficiency levels required for the position of Team Lead Pre-Sales are defined using the following key terms:


	Solution Architecting - Mastery
	Technical Sales - Mastery
	Analytical thinking &ndash; Mastery
	Presentation Skills - Mastery
	Interpersonal skills - Mastery
	Communication &ndash; Mastery
	Business Skill - Mastery
	Functional Technical Leadership &ndash; Mastery
	Credibility - Mastery
	Adaptability- Skill
	Teamwork &ndash; Mastery
	Self-Motivation - Mastery.


Definition of competence levels is in Appendix 1
Awareness:


	A good understanding of what is involved in an area of expertise and its relevance to the business.
	Ability to describe the main elements of the area of expertise and their importance to the business; and
	Ability to recognize how and where competences in expertise are relevant to their own job.


Knowledge:


	Ability to interpret and evaluate information and advice from experts in an area of Expertise.
	Knowledge and ability to correctly use the terminology (vocabulary) of the area of Expertise.
	Ability to hold an informed debate with experts in the Area of Expertise; and
	Ability to ask questions that test the viability of proposals in an Area of Expertise.


Skill:


	Ability to consistently carry out the activities of an area of Expertise to the required standard.
	Ability to perform satisfactorily majority of activities of the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to translate guidelines and standards for the Area of Expertise into practical actions.
	Ability to solve imaginatively common technical /operational problems in the Area of Expertise, and
	Ability to guide and advise others in operational /technical aspects of the Area of Expertise.


Mastery:


	Ability to diagnose and resolve significant, unusual problems and to successfully adapt aspects of an Area of Expertise.
	Ability to creatively solve significant, complex, non-routine problems in the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to adapt practices from other markets or countries for use in the Area of Expertise; and
	Ability to generate substantial improvements to local practices and procedures for the Area of Expertise.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: career@zojatech.com using the Job Position as subject of the mail.",

Senior Growth Manager Job at Zojatech Technology Limited




        
    

        
        Zojatech Technology Limited is a digital transformation consultancy and software development company based in Nigeria. They specialize in providing innovative software solutions aimed at streamlining work processes, enhancing productivity, and enabling business scalability. Their services include software development, web design, mobile app development, digital marketing, and IT consulting, making them a key player in delivering effective technology solutions across various industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Growth Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: VP Growth
Direct Reports: Solutions Architect, Senior Solutions Architect, Product Managers, Engineering, Interns
Internal Relationships: Project Unit, Heads of Divisions, Engineering, Sales
External Relationships: Client Execs, Vendors

 

Job Summary


	The Senior Growth Manager will be responsible for driving user acquisition, engagement, and revenue growth for our B2B and B2C product.
	This person will lead the development and execution of growth strategies across the entire customer journey, from acquisition to retention and loyalty. As a key member of the leadership team, the Senior Growth Manager will work closely with product, engineering and strategy to build, measure, and optimize growth efforts.


Key Roles & Responsibilities


	Develop and execute a comprehensive growth strategy to drive user acquisition, engagement, and revenue.
	Collaborate with product, strategy, and engineering teams to identify, prioritize, and execute on growth opportunities.
	Analyze user data and customer feedback to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities for growth.
	Develop and maintain a deep understanding of our target customer segments and the competitive landscape.
	Design and run experiments to test different growth tactics and optimize performance.
	Design, measure, and optimize the customer journey across all channels and stages, from acquisition to retention and loyalty.
	Create and manage a growth dashboard to track key metrics and communicate progress to the leadership team.
	Lead the marketing team to develop and execute marketing campaigns that drive growth.
	Collaborate with engineering and product teams to develop new features and product enhancements that drive growth.
	Stay up-to-date with the latest growth tactics and best practices in the industry.
	Lead and develop a strong growth team.
	Develop and execute strategies to scale the company’s product by gaining adequate market shareand industry leadership.


Academic Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field.
	Core strength and verifiable experience in scaling startups
	Strong analytical skills and experience using data to drive decision-making.
	Strong project management and team management skills.
	Experience with A/B testing and experimentation.
	Strong understanding of customer acquisition and retention strategies.
	Experience in the Fintech industry is a plus.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.


Professional Qualifications:


	MBA, CCIE, CCNP, CCNA, MCSE, or any other relevant professional qualifications.


Experience:


	Minimum of 5 years of experience in growth or marketing roles, with at least 2 years of experience in a leadership role.
	5 years in an ICT Operating environment with hands on experience in Network Administration, Network Security, LAN/WAN optimization, Project delivery, Technical solutions designing, and executive management and at least 3 years in senior management positions, Knowledge of programming language.


Skills & Competencies:
The competence proficiency levels required for the position of Team Lead Pre-Sales are defined using the following key terms:


	Solution Architecting - Mastery
	Technical Sales - Mastery
	Analytical thinking – Mastery
	Presentation Skills - Mastery
	Interpersonal skills - Mastery
	Communication – Mastery
	Business Skill - Mastery
	Functional Technical Leadership – Mastery
	Credibility - Mastery
	Adaptability- Skill
	Teamwork – Mastery
	Self-Motivation - Mastery.


Definition of competence levels is in Appendix 1
Awareness:


	A good understanding of what is involved in an area of expertise and its relevance to the business.
	Ability to describe the main elements of the area of expertise and their importance to the business; and
	Ability to recognize how and where competences in expertise are relevant to their own job.


Knowledge:


	Ability to interpret and evaluate information and advice from experts in an area of Expertise.
	Knowledge and ability to correctly use the terminology (vocabulary) of the area of Expertise.
	Ability to hold an informed debate with experts in the Area of Expertise; and
	Ability to ask questions that test the viability of proposals in an Area of Expertise.


Skill:


	Ability to consistently carry out the activities of an area of Expertise to the required standard.
	Ability to perform satisfactorily majority of activities of the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to translate guidelines and standards for the Area of Expertise into practical actions.
	Ability to solve imaginatively common technical /operational problems in the Area of Expertise, and
	Ability to guide and advise others in operational /technical aspects of the Area of Expertise.


Mastery:


	Ability to diagnose and resolve significant, unusual problems and to successfully adapt aspects of an Area of Expertise.
	Ability to creatively solve significant, complex, non-routine problems in the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to adapt practices from other markets or countries for use in the Area of Expertise; and
	Ability to generate substantial improvements to local practices and procedures for the Area of Expertise.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.
